creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Lev, please show us your build options (from /etc/make.conf and - if any - 
makeoptions from your kernel config). Also please tell us about the cc 
version you're using. 
Please check, if removing all make options will work for you and check if 
you've got another c compiler installed.  
Also please check your filesystem (esp. /usr/obj). 
You may also want to make sure if your hardware is really fine (memory).
